name: Website
description: Two-phase website strategy — Phase 1 waitlist site by end of April, Phase 2 full launch site by late June with pricing and Georgia Godwin.

actions.task: Engage WordPress designer THIS WEEK — or decide Squarespace/Webflow as Phase 1 interim
Decision: WordPress vs Squarespace/Webflow for Phase 1 — decide today
Confirm domain and hosting setup with Scott
Compress and prepare 2-3 AIS shoot images for web use
Prepare Phase 1 copy: brand tagline, "what GO is" short description
Confirm ActiveCampaign integration approach with designer
Prepare GO logo files (PNG and SVG) for designer
Phase 1 site live by end of April 2026
Phase 2 brief to designer — once pricing and product scope confirmed

ideas.text: Don't wait for the perfect designer — a solid Phase 1 on Squarespace in 2 weeks beats a perfect WordPress site in 8 weeks
Phase 1 must NOT show pricing or detailed product features — keep it vague but professional
